props.ChoiceText: The job went bad below, and you stayed alive by trusting old tiles, wet gutters, and bad judgment at speed.
props.ChoiceBio: A night roof escape taught you that gravity is only one of several interested parties in a theft.

0.TransitionText: Because a night roof escape taught you that gravity is only one of several interested parties in a theft, grand skill collapsed back into ordinary crime and its constant dangers.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Criminal, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a night roof escape taught you that gravity is only one of several interested parties in a theft, theft, planning, and nerve remained your proper craft.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Master Thief, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a night roof escape taught you that gravity is only one of several interested parties in a theft, stealth and nerve found a bloodier purpose.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Assassin, but you may remain on your current path instead.
